name: P & J Pawn
description_short: P & J Pawn is a Dallas-based pawn shop offering collateral-based loans and merchandise sales with an emphasis on customer service and personality.
description_long: P & J Pawn operates as a pawn shop located at 4501 Columbia Ave in Dallas, Texas. The business positions itself as 'The Pawn Shop with Personality,' suggesting a customer-focused approach to the traditional pawn lending model. The company maintains an active social media presence across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and email, indicating engagement with modern marketing channels and customer communication. The company operates during regular business hours and maintains moderate pricing (indicated by a single-dollar sign rating). Customers can contact the business via phone at (214) 828-1313, email at 4501pjpawn@gmail.com, or through social media channels. The company differentiates itself through its emphasis on personality and brand identity, as evidenced by their tagline and active social media strategy. They produce regular video content on Reels and maintain engagement with followers across multiple platforms (1,000+ Facebook followers documented). The business promotes itself across Instagram and TikTok under the handle 'pandjpawn' and '4501_PJ_PAWN,' suggesting a deliberate effort to build community and brand recognition beyond traditional pawn shop operations. With an 86% recommendation rate based on 28 Facebook reviews, P & J Pawn demonstrates reasonable customer satisfaction for the pawn industry. However, the limited public information about specific loan terms, interest rates, or service details means potential customers should contact the business directly for precise information about loan amounts, repayment terms, and collateral requirements.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

Multiple contact channels available: phone, email, and active social media presence
Maintains active engagement on Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok with regular content updates
Positioned as customer-service-focused 'Pawn Shop with Personality'
Conveniently located at 4501 Columbia Ave in Dallas with standard business hours
Uses modern marketing through video Reels and social media to attract younger demographics
cons: No detailed information about loan terms, APR rates, or repayment periods publicly available
No specific information about maximum loan amounts or collateral types accepted
Limited business hours information provided on primary website
No transparency about late fees, default consequences, or redemption policies
Facebook page primarily in Russian language interface, potentially limiting accessibility for English-only speakers
best_for: Individuals in Dallas needing quick cash against personal collateral or jewelry
People seeking to buy discounted merchandise or used goods in the Dallas area
Customers who prefer face-to-face transactions with personable service
diagnosis: P & J Pawn is best for Dallas-area residents who need quick collateral-based loans or want to purchase discounted merchandise with minimal friction. The primary caveat is the lack of publicly disclosed loan terms, rates, and policies—customers must contact the business directly to understand specific costs, loan limits, and repayment obligations before pawning items.
services: Potential jewelry or precious metals evaluation
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
